senses.gloss: person, soul (e.g., in a census, as a numerative in statistics)

examples.text: الْحَيُّ الَّذِي كَانَ يَقْطُنُهُ مَا لَا يَقِلُّ عَنْ ٨٠ أَلْفَ نَسَمَةٍ.
examples.english: The neighborhood was inhabited by no less than 80,000 people.

etymology.text: Compare Classical Syriac ܢܫܡܬܐ (nashamatha, “breath, soul, spirit”) and Hebrew נְשָׁמָה (nəšāmâ, “breath, soul, spirit”).
